title: ageratina boyacensis
intro: Ageratina boyacensis, also known as "Balsamita", is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to Colombia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is rich in essential oils and compounds that provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Ageratina boyacensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various herbal preparations.
